summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of GroFresh subscription platform. All core features working correctly including subscription creation, order generation, inventory blocking, and admin functionality.
passed_tests: Products API - list, create, update stock
Subscriptions API - create daily/weekly, pause/resume, delete
Orders API - list orders with proper status
Create subscription flow - product selection and frequency choice
Admin dashboard - product management and stock updates
Inventory blocking - orders blocked when stock insufficient
Blocked order display with proper error messaging
Real-time inventory updates after order generation
Product stock status display (In Stock/Low Stock/Out of Stock)
